headline: Assessing Northrop Grumman (NOC) Valuation After A Recent Pullback And Mixed Fair Value Signals
summary: Recent share performance and business scale Northrop Grumman (NOC) has attracted fresh attention after a recent pullback, with the stock down about 14% over the past month and roughly 8% over the past 3 months. At a recent closing price of US$611.13 and a market value near US$93.3b, the company is among the larger aerospace and defense names, supported by reported annual revenue of US$42.4b and net income of US$4.6b.
